title: EvangelionWorld Featuring a Full Size Bust of Unit 01
display_title: EvangelionWorld Featuring a Full Size Bust of Unit 01
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion:World, Featuring a Full-Size Bust of Unit 01             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Apr 14, 2010 9:25 pm And it looks like they're doing a survey on which Eva unit people would like to see the most. You can vote for Unit 00, 01, 02, 03, or 05. Now, the fact that this is supposed to be "full-size" raises an important question: which full size?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 14, 2010 9:52 pm Something tells me Yui-sama will win, hands down. But we'll see.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Apr 14, 2010 9:55 pm It was bound to happen eventually. I would vote for Unit-02.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Apr 14, 2010 9:55 pm I have to see this.

[]:             Quote Post by IDontWantNoScrub » Wed Apr 14, 2010 9:58 pm Have they seen what happens on the show? I think this is a bad idea haha.

[]: Re: They're Planning on Building a Full-Size Evangelion             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Apr 14, 2010 10:04 pm NAveryW wrote: [Now, the fact that this is supposed to be "full-size" raises an important question: which full size?

[]: Re: They're Planning on Building a Full-Size Evangelion             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 14, 2010 10:15 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: And no there is no ambiguity at all for the Rebuild Eva size

[]: Re: They're Planning on Building a Full-Size Evangelion             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Apr 14, 2010 10:25 pm Reichu wrote: because Rebuild Evas are still 40m-ish tall when they're Caged

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Apr 14, 2010 10:28 pm Baw, I was hoping the Eva statue would be 80 meters. Ten meters isn't nearly as fun.

[]: Re: They're Planning on Building a Full-Size Evangelion             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 15, 2010 8:31 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Prove it. Seriously. I'm getting really tired of people using 40m without any proof at all. None. Ever.

[]: Re: They're Planning on Building a Full-Size Evangelion             Quote Post by drinian » Thu Apr 15, 2010 9:31 am NAveryW wrote: Now, the fact that this is supposed to be "full-size" raises an important question: which full size?

[]: Re: They're Planning on Building a Full-Size Evangelion             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Apr 15, 2010 1:55 pm Reichu wrote: so why you make so much ado over one production image (that doesn't actually prove what you want it to prove) is beyond me.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Thu Apr 15, 2010 2:28 pm I think Unit 01 will end up winning being build since it's the most popular Eva unit afterall. IIRC The eva units are 80 meters tall, and seeing one getting made would make it bigger then the Showa Godzilla? God thing is going to be big. They should do a life size Arc-Gurren Lagann next lol.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Apr 15, 2010 6:13 pm Unit 01 and 02, definitely. Enough said.

[]:             Quote Post by Lui » Thu Apr 15, 2010 8:29 pm Honestly, successful as Eva is, I can't see them building a life-size (as in 80m) high Evangelion, cool as it would be. Anyway, Unit 01 is going to win this poll hands down.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Apr 15, 2010 8:31 pm Lui wrote: Honestly, successful as Eva is, I can't see them building a life-size (as in 80m) high Evangelion, cool as it would be.

[]: Re: They're Planning on Building a Full-Size Evangelion             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 15, 2010 9:13 pm @TMB: I think you've let a bit too much hostility seep into this "non-issue". Behaving in a manner that leads the other party to perceive you as antagonistic is one of the best ways to hijack what might otherwise bring them to your side without much of a hitch. This can be a two-sided process, of course (and tends to feed itself). I thought I would mention it for possibly mutual benefit. I don't consider my original pixel-counting endeavor a waste of time, since the result I got was in fact consistent with an official statistic. Not to mention, it didn't really take that long. (And, yes, perspective and etc. etc. was very much on my mind.) I get the feeling that I've pressed your "somebody assaulting the honor and integrity of animators" berserk button, so that's it from me... until I waste my time at some point figuring out how big the caged Eva-01 is in 1.0, and doing a comparative mockup of Eva-01 at "official" Rebuild dimensions... just because somebody has to do it, for the lulz if nothing else .

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Thu Apr 15, 2010 10:26 pm Lui wrote: Honestly, successful as Eva is, I can't see them building a life-size (as in 80m) high Evangelion, cool as it would be. Anyway, Unit 01 is going to win this poll hands down.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Apr 16, 2010 12:52 am cyharding wrote: They built a life-size Gundam, so it wouldn't be outside the realm of possibility.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Fri Apr 16, 2010 10:34 am cyharding wrote: They built a life-size Gundam, so it wouldn't be outside the realm of possibility.
